# Auto-generated by the ros2-sysmlv2 bridge pipeline. Regenerated on every run.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
project(ground_robot_with_nav2)

if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
endif()

find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
find_package(rclcpp REQUIRED)
find_package(rclcpp_lifecycle REQUIRED)
find_package(geometry_msgs REQUIRED)
find_package(nav_msgs REQUIRED)
find_package(sensor_msgs REQUIRED)

add_executable(nav2_lidar_driver
  src/nav2_lidar_driver_node.cpp
  src/nav2_lidar_driver_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(nav2_lidar_driver PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(nav2_lidar_driver
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(depth_camera_driver
  src/depth_camera_driver_node.cpp
  src/depth_camera_driver_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(depth_camera_driver PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(depth_camera_driver
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(nav2_imu_driver
  src/nav2_imu_driver_node.cpp
  src/nav2_imu_driver_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(nav2_imu_driver PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(nav2_imu_driver
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(point_cloud_filter
  src/point_cloud_filter_node.cpp
  src/point_cloud_filter_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(point_cloud_filter PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(point_cloud_filter
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(nav2_e_k_f_localizer
  src/nav2_e_k_f_localizer_node.cpp
  src/nav2_e_k_f_localizer_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(nav2_e_k_f_localizer PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(nav2_e_k_f_localizer
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

install(TARGETS
  nav2_lidar_driver
  depth_camera_driver
  nav2_imu_driver
  point_cloud_filter
  nav2_e_k_f_localizer
  DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME})

# Language-neutral Python helpers (same scripts as the ament_python package).
install(PROGRAMS
  scripts/conformance_monitor
  scripts/activate_nodes
  DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME})

install(DIRECTORY launch config
  DESTINATION share/${PROJECT_NAME})

ament_package()
